description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a tan and black color scheme, giving it a modern, military-inspired appearance. The body is constructed with angular, reinforced panels and a prominent, boxy receiver, suggesting durability and advanced engineering. A large, rectangular magazine is visible beneath the receiver, indicating a high-capacity, magazine-fed system. The stock is a skeletonized, ergonomic design with a thumbhole grip, enhancing control and comfort during use. The barrel is encased in a protective shroud, with visible venting and mechanical details that hint at a semi-automatic or advanced action mechanism. Overall, the shotgun exudes a sense of power and precision, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a tan and black finish, skeletonized thumbhole stock, and a boxy, high-capacity magazine. Its angular, reinforced body and vented barrel shroud suggest advanced engineering and urban utility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muzzle, barrel shroud, and the symmetrical, angular fore-end with the magazine slightly visible below.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the shotgun, the large box magazine, skeletonized thumbhole stock, and detailed receiver with mechanical features.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the stock's thumbhole grip, the symmetrical rear housing, and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the magazine, stock, and detailed body panels, with additional perspective on the receiver's contours.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with reinforced edges and integrated finger groove
